workloads.name: buffer-upload 1KB
workloads.description: Single upload command used to align with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides; Fawn uses deferred queue sync to avoid per-command wait inflation at tiny payload size while preserving per-upload timing normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: buffer-upload 64KB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 64KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: buffer-upload 1MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: buffer-upload 4MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 4MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: buffer-upload 16MB
workloads.description: Single upload command aligned with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 16MB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: buffer-upload 256MB
workloads.description: Single upload command for large-payload directional profiling (256MB).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples upload contract via command-stream Dawn delegate lane; both sides execute the same 256MB WriteBuffer workload with strict normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: buffer-upload 1GB
workloads.description: Single upload command for large-payload directional profiling (1GB).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples upload contract via command-stream Dawn delegate lane; both sides execute the same 1GB WriteBuffer workload with strict normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: buffer-upload 4GB
workloads.description: Single upload command for large-payload directional profiling (4GB).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples upload contract via command-stream Dawn delegate lane; both sides execute the same 4GB WriteBuffer workload with strict normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: workgroup-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Workgroup-atomic compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf exactly.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Kernel matches Dawn GenWorkgroupWithAtomics (256 threads, 1 atomicStore + 256 atomicLoads per invocation). Both sides dispatch 100 times per step with direct timing (no side-specific divisor scaling).
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: workgroup-non-atomic 1024
workloads.description: Non-atomic workgroup compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf non-atomic variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Kernel matches Dawn GenWorkgroupNoAtomics (256 threads, 1 store + 256 loads per invocation). Both sides dispatch 100 times per step with direct timing (no side-specific divisor scaling).
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (naive swizzle0)
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=Naive, Swizzle=0, 100 dispatches).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples matrix-vector contract aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf variant geometry and per-dispatch normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (naive swizzle1)
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=Naive, Swizzle=1, 100 dispatches).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples matrix-vector contract aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf variant geometry and per-dispatch normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (workgroupshared swizzle1)
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=WorkgroupShared, Swizzle=1, 100 dispatches).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples matrix-vector contract aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf variant geometry and per-dispatch normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: shader-compile pipeline stress
workloads.description: Shader robustness pipeline stress aligned with Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf (MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray, f32, 512x512x512).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched compute pipeline creation + dispatch shape against Dawn ShaderRobustnessPerf MatMulFloatOneDimSharedArray f32 variant, including 50-dispatch step normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: render draw throughput
workloads.description: Native render/draw throughput workload aligned to Dawn DrawCallPerf base variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Both sides execute DrawCallPerf-style draw-call throughput against a 64x64 render target with static pipeline and bind-group defaults.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn DrawCallPerf reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn render_draw normalizes to per-draw units.

workloads.name: render draw state/bindings
workloads.description: Render-pass state and bind-group benchmark using explicit viewport/scissor/blend/stencil + dynamic bind offsets.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup variant with per-draw normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn command stream normalizes to per-draw units.

workloads.name: render redundant pipeline/bindings
workloads.description: Render workload that intentionally rebinds pipeline and bind groups every draw.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf RedundantPipeline_RedundantBindGroups variant with per-draw normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn DrawCallPerf redundant-pipeline variant reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn repeats the redundant-pipeline command stream 10x and normalizes to per-draw units to reduce sample-tail setup jitter.

workloads.name: render bundle dynamic bindings
workloads.description: Render-bundle workload with dynamic bind-group offsets.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicBindGroup_RenderBundle variant with per-draw normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn DrawCallPerf render-bundle variant reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn normalizes to per-draw units.

workloads.name: render bundle dynamic pipeline+bindings
workloads.description: Render-bundle workload with dynamic pipeline and dynamic bind-group updates.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicPipeline_DynamicBindGroup_RenderBundle variant with per-draw normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn DrawCallPerf dynamic-pipeline render-bundle variant reports per draw (iterationsPerStep=2000); Fawn normalizes to per-draw units.

workloads.name: draw indexed render proxy
workloads.description: Indexed draw-call throughput benchmark using command-provided index buffers.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only draw-indexed proxy. Mapped to Dawn DrawCallPerf DynamicVertexBuffer as the nearest proxy; not strict apples-to-apples.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Both sides report per-draw throughput units; Fawn issues indexed draws and Dawn uses the closest draw-call throughput proxy variant. Repeat=10 plus deferred queue sync reduces per-sample setup/sync overhead while preserving per-draw normalization.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn-side draw-indexed variant and command-shape normalization are contract-equivalent.

workloads.name: texture sampling/raster
workloads.description: Texture/raster workload combining texture-sampling compute with a native render_draw raster step.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf arrayLayer_16_mipLevel_3 with per-iteration normalization.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf reports per iteration (iterationsPerStep=50); Fawn repeats the combined compute+render path 500 times, disables kernel GPU timestamp queries for this lane (`--gpu-timestamp-mode off`), and normalizes to per-iteration units.

workloads.name: texture sampler/write/query/destroy contract
workloads.description: Texture API contract benchmark covering sampler creation, queue write texture, texture query assertions, and resource destroy lifecycle.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf arrayLayer_16_mipLevel_3 while Fawn runs explicit sampler/write/query/destroy + raster command stream.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Fawn command stream executes sampler/texture lifecycle calls plus render draws; repeat=10 and per-iteration normalization reduce fixed setup/sync skew while keeping SubresourceTrackingPerf-oriented units.

workloads.name: texture sampler/write/query/destroy contract (mip8)
workloads.description: Texture API contract benchmark aligned to SubresourceTrackingPerf mipLevel=8 variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Mapped to Dawn SubresourceTrackingPerf arrayLayer_16_mipLevel_8 with the same Fawn texture lifecycle command stream.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Normalized per iteration against the SubresourceTrackingPerf mipLevel=8 variant with repeat=10 to amortize fixed setup/sync overhead.

workloads.name: async pipeline diagnostics contract
workloads.description: Async diagnostics benchmark covering async render pipeline creation, error scopes, and shader compilation info.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: command shape, Dawn filter mapping, and timing normalization are explicitly aligned for strict comparability.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples only: Fawn repeats async diagnostics command and normalizes by async sub-steps to reduce fixed process/setup skew.

workloads.name: p1 capability introspection contract
workloads.description: Directional contract workload for adapter/device/instance capability introspection and free-members lifecycle checks.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples P1 capability contract: normalize as a per-command introspection sequence.

workloads.name: p1 resource-table/immediates contract
workloads.description: Directional contract workload for Dawn ResourceTable and immediates APIs with explicit feature-gating parity.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples P1 resource-table contract: normalize by command-sequence sub-steps with deterministic feature-gating parity support.

workloads.name: p2 lifecycle/refcount contract
workloads.description: Directional contract workload for AddRef lifecycle touch coverage across core object classes.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples P2 lifecycle contract: normalize by addref/release touch count within the lifecycle sequence.

workloads.name: p1 capability introspection macro (500)
workloads.description: Directional macro capability workload repeating capability introspection 500 times inside one command.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples macro capability contract: normalize per internal introspection iteration.

workloads.name: p1 resource-table/immediates macro (500)
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples macro ResourceTable workload repeating resource-table/immediates path 500 times inside one command.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples macro contract. Dawn filter mapping is explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: p2 lifecycle/refcount macro (200)
workloads.description: Directional macro lifecycle workload repeating AddRef touch coverage 200 times inside one command.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples macro lifecycle contract: normalize per internal addref/release touch operations across macro iterations.

workloads.name: render draw throughput macro (200k draws)
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples macro render throughput workload using a 200k-draw command stream.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples macro contract. Dawn filter mapping is explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples macro workload: normalize to per-draw units with fixed setup amortization over the 200k draw stream.

workloads.name: draw indexed macro (200k draws)
workloads.description: Directional macro indexed draw stress using a 200k-draw indexed command stream.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples macro workload: normalize to per-draw units over 200k indexed draws with deferred queue sync.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable when Dawn mapping gains a contract-equivalent indexed macro benchmark path.

workloads.name: texture contract macro (500 draws)
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples macro texture lifecycle workload with a larger render-draw phase for setup amortization analysis.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples macro contract. Dawn filter mapping is explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples macro workload: normalize to per-iteration units over a 500-draw texture lifecycle command stream.

workloads.name: p0 resource lifecycle contract
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples contract workload for upload-buffer resize churn plus explicit barrier submission.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract. Dawn filter mapping and repeat accounting are explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples lifecycle contract: normalize per command-sequence iteration over upload resize + barrier operations.

workloads.name: p0 compute indirect/timestamp contract
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples compute contract workload for async pipeline creation, indirect dispatch, and timestamp/query APIs.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples compute contract. Dawn filter mapping and repeat accounting are explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples compute contract: command repeat=20 and kernel repeat=256 are normalized to per-dispatch units (20*256).

workloads.name: p0 render multidraw contract
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples render-pass workload focused on occlusion/timestamp query wiring and multidraw API path parity.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract. Dawn filter mapping and repeat accounting are explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples render contract: normalize per draw with explicit setup amortization over the render-pass draw stream.

workloads.name: p0 render multidraw indexed contract
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples indexed render-pass workload for indexed multidraw API path parity and query wiring.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples indexed contract. Dawn DrawCallPerf now includes DynamicVertexBuffer_DrawIndexed coverage, so filter mapping and repeat accounting are explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples indexed render contract: normalize per draw with explicit setup amortization over indexed draw stream.

workloads.name: p0 render pixel-local-storage barrier contract
workloads.description: Directional P0 contract workload for pipeline-layout/render-pass pixel-local-storage chains plus explicit barrier invocation under feature-gating parity.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only contract. Dawn filter mapping is diagnostic and excluded from strict apples-to-apples claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional-only: Apples-to-apples PLS contract: normalize per barrier-sequencing sub-steps over repeated non-coherent diagnostic iterations.

workloads.name: p0 render pixel-local-storage barrier macro (500)
workloads.description: Apples-to-apples macro PLS workload with 500 in-command iterations to stress non-coherent barrier sequencing overhead.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples macro contract. Dawn filter mapping is explicitly aligned for strict claim lanes.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Apples-to-apples macro PLS contract: command-repeat=500 with per-iteration barrier-sequencing normalization and explicit feature-gating parity support.

workloads.name: surface presentation contract
workloads.description: Surface presentation contract mapped for apples-to-apples lane validation across create/release and concurrent surface sequencing.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict lane for surface lifecycle protocol visibility in the extended comparable suite. Mapped through concurrent presentation coordination to keep fixed command shape while protocol parity is developed.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: copy buffer-to-texture contract
workloads.description: Directional copy contract covering buffer-to-texture transfer path.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only copy contract. This benchmark is intentionally non-claimable until a Dawn-side copy-API parity path is added.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional copy contract only: normalize per copy command sequence.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once a Dawn map exists for direct copy-path parity.

workloads.name: copy texture-to-buffer contract
workloads.description: Directional copy contract covering texture-to-buffer transfer path.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only copy contract. This benchmark is intentionally non-claimable until a Dawn-side texture-to-buffer parity path is added.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional texture-to-buffer copy contract only: normalize per copy command sequence.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once a Dawn texture-to-buffer copy-path contract is established.

workloads.name: dispatch fallback contract
workloads.description: Directional dispatch benchmark exercising the builtin fallback dispatch command path.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only dispatch contract. This benchmark is intentionally non-claimable until a Dawn-side comparable dispatch-likelihood lane is added.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional dispatch contract only: normalize per fallback dispatch operation.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once a Dawn compute-dispatch parity contract is established.

workloads.name: copy protocol contract
workloads.description: Directional mixed protocol benchmark combining sampler, copy, barrier, diagnostics, and texture lifecycle checks.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only protocol contract. This benchmark is intentionally non-claimable while copy-path parity remains directional.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional mixed protocol contract only: normalize across one full mixed API sequence.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn benchmark coverage includes the same mixed protocol command sequence.

workloads.name: copy texture-to-texture contract
workloads.description: Directional copy contract covering texture-to-texture transfer path.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only copy contract. This benchmark is intentionally non-claimable until a Dawn-side texture-to-texture parity path is added.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional texture-to-texture copy contract only: normalize per copy command sequence.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once a Dawn texture-to-texture copy-path contract is established.

workloads.name: dispatch grid contract
workloads.description: Directional dispatch contract exercising non-trivial 3D dispatch grid shapes through fallback dispatch command path.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only dispatch protocol contract. This benchmark is intentionally non-claimable until a Dawn compute-dispatch parity lane is added.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional dispatch grid contract only: normalize across both-dispatch-sequence workload steps.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once a Dawn multi-shape dispatch parity contract is established.

workloads.name: surface full presentation contract
workloads.description: Directional surface lifecycle contract covering capabilities/configure/acquire/present/unconfigure/release operations.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only surface contract. This benchmark expands surface coverage beyond create/release for protocol-level parity diagnostics.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional full-surface contract only: normalize per full presentation cycle.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn and platform surface-present parity is contractually mapped.

workloads.name: concurrent execution single-dispatch contract
workloads.description: Compute contract aligned to Dawn ConcurrentExecutionTest RunSingle with a single heavy compute dispatch.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: command shape and Dawn filter mapping both exercise one long-running compute dispatch per benchmark step.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

workloads.name: uniform buffer update (WriteBuffer partial single)
workloads.description: Uniform update + draw benchmark aligned to Dawn UniformBufferUpdatePerf WriteBuffer Partial SingleUniformBuffer variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: per-iteration upload+draw workflow and normalization aligned to Dawn UniformBufferUpdatePerf WriteBuffer/Partial/SingleUniformBuffer.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn UniformBufferUpdatePerf already reports per-iteration metrics (iterationsPerStep=100 internal normalization). Fawn repeats upload+draw 100 times and applies leftTimingDivisor normalization only.

workloads.name: zero-initialize workgroup memory (256)
workloads.description: Compute workload aligned to Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest workgroupSize=256 variant.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples contract: workgroup-size and iteration structure aligned to Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn VulkanZeroInitializeWorkgroupMemoryExtensionTest already reports per-iteration metrics (iterationsPerStep=50 internal normalization). Fawn repeats dispatch 50 times and applies leftTimingDivisor normalization only.

workloads.name: buffer map readback 1kb
workloads.description: One-shot map/read/unmap cycle over 1KB mapped buffers.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable map-readback candidate for buffer staging semantics and mapped-range validation.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Dawn map-readback parity is tracked as per-op map-read-unmap units with one ignore-first warmup path.

workloads.name: buffer map readback 64kb
workloads.description: One-shot map/read/unmap cycle over 64KB mapped buffers.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable map-readback candidate focused on larger staging windows.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable readback lane normalizing to per-op map-read-unmap units over a 64KB transfer size.

workloads.name: buffer map write 1kb
workloads.description: One-shot map/write/unmap cycle over 1KB mapped buffers.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable map-write candidate for write-through staging semantics and deterministic source fill.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable writeback lane normalizing to per-op map-write-unmap units at 1KB.

workloads.name: buffer map write 64kb
workloads.description: One-shot map/write/unmap cycle over 64KB mapped buffers.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable map-write candidate for larger staging windows and mapped memory throughput.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable writeback lane normalizing to per-op map-write-unmap units at 64KB.

workloads.name: buffer map partial read 4kb
workloads.description: One-shot partial map/read path over a fixed 4KB subrange.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable partial-range read candidate isolating subrange map behavior.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable partial-range lane normalizing to per-op partial read mapping.

workloads.name: buffer map partial write 64kb
workloads.description: One-shot partial map/write path over a fixed 64KB subrange.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable partial-range write candidate for subrange validation and bounds coverage.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable partial-range lane normalizing to per-op partial write mapping at 64KB subrange.

workloads.name: buffer map double request guard
workloads.description: Error-path workload ensuring repeated map requests before unmap remain deterministic.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional error-path parity candidate for second-map-while-mapped sequencing.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional error-path contract: validate deterministic map-error behavior and unmap recovery in paired map attempts.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once a Dawn map-error double-request parity contract is established.

workloads.name: buffer map unmap storm macro
workloads.description: Mixed read/write map/unmap macro stream stressing repeated mapping cycles.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable high-frequency map/unmap candidate with deterministic pair-normalized output.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable macro lane with two mapping operations per iteration; divisor accounts for per-op normalization.

workloads.name: dispatch indirect 1
workloads.description: Indirect dispatch lane with one dispatch-indirect arg buffer.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable base indirect-dispatch lane for command-shape parity.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable indirect-dispatch baseline normalized to one dispatch per mapped arg update.

workloads.name: dispatch indirect live args
workloads.description: Live-updated indirect dispatch args with fixed dispatch pipeline.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional indirect-arg mutability candidate for argument-buffer coherence parity.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional live-arg lane with per-dispatch normalization and per-iteration arg updates.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn exposes an equivalent live-indirect-args dispatch contract.

workloads.name: dispatch indirect large args
workloads.description: Boundary-focused indirect dispatch arg-buffer stress with bounded range validation.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional indirect arg-boundary candidate for large-arg-buffer coverage.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional large-arg contract normalized per dispatch operation with explicit argument range checks.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn-side large-indirect-args parity contract is added.

workloads.name: dispatch workgroups 2D sweep
workloads.description: Dispatch-sweep workload over 2D workgroup geometry variants.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable 2D dispatch partition candidate for deterministic geometry shaping.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable dispatch-sweep lane with fixed total-work normalization across 2D shape variants.

workloads.name: dispatch workgroups 3D sweep
workloads.description: Dispatch-sweep workload over 3D workgroup geometry variants.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional 3D geometry candidate for fixed-work dispatch shape coverage.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional 3D sweep lane normalized per dispatch step with fixed total work normalization.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn includes a 3D dispatch-shape parity contract.

workloads.name: dispatch indirect pipeline switch
workloads.description: Indirect dispatch workload alternating pipelines between launches.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional indirect pipeline-switch candidate for compute state-transition coverage.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional pipeline-switch indirect lane normalized per dispatch with fixed indirect arg state.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn includes an indirect dispatch pipeline-switch contract.

workloads.name: kernel dispatch macro 1000
workloads.description: Macro dispatch command stream carrying 1000 kernel dispatch repeats per sample.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional macro candidate with high repeat density for tail-stability diagnostics.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional macro lane normalizing to per-dispatch operation across a 20x1000 inner repeat.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable when Dawn has equivalent macro-dispatch repeat parity.

workloads.name: draw indexed indirect u16
workloads.description: Indexed indirect draw path using U16 index format.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable indirect-index candidate for indexed rendering argument decoding parity.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable indexed-indirect lane normalizing to one indirect indexed draw per sample.

workloads.name: draw indexed indirect u32
workloads.description: Indexed indirect draw path using U32 index format.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable indexed-indirect candidate for index-format parity across u32 decoding.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable indexed-indirect lane normalizing to one indirect indexed draw per sample.

workloads.name: draw indirect legacy equivalent
workloads.description: Legacy-style indirect draw proxy using legacy-equivalent argument shape.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional indirect draw candidate for legacy-compatible proxy parity.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional legacy draw proxy normalized per indirect draw command.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once a Dawn legacy-indirect proxy parity contract is available.

workloads.name: render pass loadOps clear/load
workloads.description: Render pass load-op coverage for clear/load combinations.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable render-pass loadOp candidate for transition and clear/load parity.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable render-pass lane normalized per pass operation across clear/load boundaries.

workloads.name: render pass storeOps discard
workloads.description: Render pass store-op coverage for discard/retain variants.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable render-pass storeOp candidate for store-mode parity.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable render-pass lane normalized per pass operation across storeOp toggles.

workloads.name: render pass depth stencil
workloads.description: Depth/stencil attachment and clear ordering pass.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional depth/stencil candidate for attachment + clear-order parity.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional depth/stencil contract normalized by one pass operation.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn depth/stencil parity contract is established.

workloads.name: render pass stencil ref sweep
workloads.description: Mid-stream stencil-ref transitions inside a render pass.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional stencil-ref candidate for state-update and validation coverage.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional state-sweep lane normalized per state-change boundary.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn adds equivalent stencil-ref sweep parity support.

workloads.name: render pass multisample resolve
workloads.description: MSAA color/depth render pass resolve contract.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional multisample candidate for color+depth resolve parity.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional MSAA resolve lane normalized per render pass resolution.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn exposes compatible MSAA resolve parity mapping.

workloads.name: render pass dynamic viewport scissor
workloads.description: Frequent dynamic viewport/scissor updates under fixed render pipeline.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional dynamic-state candidate for viewport and scissor sequencing.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional dynamic-state lane normalized per viewport/scissor command pair.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn includes equivalent dynamic viewport/scissor indirect coverage.

workloads.name: copy buffer to buffer 4kb
workloads.description: Direct buffer-to-buffer copy at 4KB range.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable copy baseline for direct B2B transfer parity.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable buffer copy lane normalizing to one direct buffer-to-buffer copy op.

workloads.name: copy buffer to buffer overlap
workloads.description: Overlapping buffer-to-buffer copy ranges with controlled region overlaps.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional overlap variant for validation-path and bounds diagnostics.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional overlap contract normalized per overlapping copy op.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn exposes overlap-allowed copy parity contract.

workloads.name: copy buffer to texture tight pitch
workloads.description: Buffer-to-texture transfer with compact row pitch geometry.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable tightly-packed copy candidate for row-byte/region-layout parity.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable copy layout lane normalizing to one buffer-to-texture transfer.

workloads.name: copy texture to buffer padded
workloads.description: Texture-to-buffer transfer using padded bytes-per-row geometry.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Comparable padded-copy candidate for texture-to-buffer row layout parity.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Comparable copy layout lane normalized to one texture-to-buffer transfer.

workloads.name: copy texture to texture subresource
workloads.description: Layered/subresource texture-to-texture copy with controlled mip transitions.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional subresource copy candidate for layered and mip-path coverage.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional subresource lane normalized per texture-to-texture copy op.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn adds layered/subresource texture copy parity mapping.

workloads.name: copy texture to texture stress macro
workloads.description: High-density texture-to-texture copy stress macro stream.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional stress macro candidate for copy command throughput and scheduler load.
workloads.timingNormalizationNote: Directional copy stress macro normalized to 60x100 effective copy ops per step.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn adds an equivalent texture-to-texture macro stress contract.
